description: The DesktopRenderSettings component is used to set Settings used in Desktop mode.

fields.FieldOfView: The fov of the desktop client.
fields.SprintFieldOfViewZoom: Whether to multiply the FOV when sprinting
fields.LimitFramerateWhenUnfocused: Whether to limit framerate when the game is unfocused.
fields.MaximumBackgroundFramerate: How much to limit the framerate when unfocused and ``LimitFramerateWhenUnfocused`` is true.
fields.FramePacingOptionsEnabled: Whether to pace frames due to options like ``MaximumBackgroundFramerate`` is being used.
fields.BackgroundFramerateEnabled: Whether to render new frames when in the background.
